N8 Refuel Energy Gel is a sports nutrition product designed to provide quick, sustained energy for athletes through low-GI carbohydrates, electrolytes, and easy-to-consume gel packaging.

---

⚡ What It Is

• N8 Refuel Energy Gel is a compact energy supplement (50g tube or 40ml packet) made for endurance sports like running, cycling, or gym training com.my +1.
• It delivers 100 calories per serving, primarily from carbohydrates, with added electrolytes to support hydration MMTF.


---

🧪 Key Ingredients & Benefits

• Palatinose (Isomaltulose)• A German-grade sugar derived from sugar beet.
• Low Glycemic Index (GI) → releases energy slowly and steadily.
• Helps the body use fat as an energy source, improving endurance MMTF.
• 100% vegan, halal, kosher, and non-GMO.

• Electrolytes• Support hydration and muscle function during long workouts.

• Texture & Packaging• Smooth, easy-to-swallow gel.
• Screw-cap tube for hygiene and resealability.
• Available in refreshing flavors like lychee com.my.



---

🏃 How It Works for Athletes

• During training, blood sugar levels drop as carbohydrates are consumed for energy.
• N8 Refuel replenishes carbs at the right intervals, preventing fatigue and maintaining performance com.my.
• Works almost immediately after consumption, making it ideal for mid-run or mid-ride refueling.


---

📦 Product Specs

Attribute	Details

Calories	~100 kcal	
Function	Pre-workout, during workout, or recovery Shopee Malaysia	
Certification	MOH certified in Malaysia Shopee Malaysia

Form	Jelly-like gel	


---

✅ Why Athletes Use It

• Steady energy release (no sugar crash).
• Convenient format for on-the-go sports.
• Supports endurance by encouraging fat metabolism.
• Halal-certified and suitable for diverse dietary needs.


---

In short, N8 Refuel Energy Gel is a practical, scientifically formulated energy booster for endurance athletes, especially useful during marathons, cycling events, or long training sessions.
